verdict.answer_first: Both answer in sentence 1; A: "pnpm. For a fresh monorepo", B: "pnpm. For a fresh monorepo"
verdict.decisiveness: A is slightly stronger: "clear default" and "Start with pnpm + Turborepo"; B also commits but softens into broader rationale.
verdict.fabrication: A risks an unsupported/version-specific detail: "packageManager": "pnpm@9"; B risks an unsupported market claim: "de facto standard now".
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on because it includes starter files: "pnpm-workspace.yaml" and root "package.json".
